title: Update podman_import test to use podman
body:
Update the podman_import test to use podman run, and update the
check method for string check method.

comments.body: use the cached images and then LGTM
LGTM once image caching is addressed

Hi @rhatdan the method to use copyimg to prepare image seems still have problem to work in RHEL7 host. Want to double confirm how to deal with it. Maybe I should report another issue to track it and update the pullreq?
Yes open a second issue, and @baude can look into it.
Thanks @rhatdan. Pullreq updated and related issue reported: https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/issues/254

:pushpin: Commit cae415b has been approved by `rhatdan`
